## How I verified it
<!-- How did you test this? e.g. ingested repo X and confirmed Y. -->


## Checklist
- [ ] `make build` passes (`go build ./...` + `npm run build`)
- [ ] `make test` passes (`go test ./...` + `npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] Added / updated tests where it makes sense
- [ ] Updated docs / comments for any user-facing change
- [ ] No secrets or real API keys are committed
- [ ] The change is focused (one logical change per PR)
